name: A2A Sales Catalog
description: Agent marketplace for product and service discovery. Query products, compare items, negotiate prices, complete purchases, browse categories — all over A2A with compact tuple responses.

skills.name: Search Catalog
skills.description: Search for products or services by query, with optional category, price, and vendor filters. Returns compact tuple arrays.
examples: Search for standing desks sorted by rating

skills.name: Lookup Item
skills.description: Get full details for a specific catalog item by its ID.

skills.name: Browse Categories
skills.description: List available product/service categories, optionally scoped to a parent category.

skills.name: Compare Items
skills.description: Compare two or more catalog items side by side. Returns a table of fields and rows.

skills.name: Negotiate Price
skills.description: Submit a price offer for an item. Supports multi-round negotiation with counter-offers. Requires authentication and reputation >= 40.

skills.name: Purchase Item
skills.description: Complete a purchase using a tokenized payment method. Optionally reference a negotiation session for the agreed price.
examples: Buy item WE-001 with payment token

skills.name: Agent Profile
skills.description: View your agent's profile including reputation, interest scores, and intent tier classification.

skills.name: Reputation Score
skills.description: Get your agent's reputation score breakdown, trust tier, and unlocked benefits.

skills.name: Semantic Embeddings
skills.description: Get semantic embedding vectors for items or a free-text query. Useful for local re-ranking, clustering, or recommendation.
examples: Get embeddings for WE-001 and WE-002
Embed the query 'comfortable earbuds for running'

skills.name: Federation Peers
skills.description: List federated catalog peers in the network. Each peer serves specific categories.

skills.name: Vendor Analytics
skills.description: Get agent behavior analytics for a vendor's products. Includes impressions, intent breakdown, top queries, and conversion metrics.
